ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-15-2003 Continued To Mar-24-03 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On January 2, 2003.
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Appearances: Anthony L. Head, Esq. for plaintiff, Molalla Holdings, Ross Hawkins, Advertisement Credit Manager for S.F. Chronicle is sworn and examined. After hearing all of the evidence the Court grants the judgment in favor of the plaintiff, and against the defendants, Internet Home Services,Inc., a California Corporation,DBA EHome.Com,DBA EHome.Com Advertising,and Anoy Oldham individually, as follows: Principal: $29,880.90; Interest to date: $4,987.71; Costs: $268.00; Statutory Attorneys fees: $660.00 for a total judgment of $35,796.61. Prevailing party is to submit a judgment for signature. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: R.Goulding; Reporter A. Duffy CSR# 12599;
